Figure 1:Tau calibration: entropy distribution before (left,τ=0.3/0.7\tau=0.3/0.7, 100% of tokens in attention regime) and
after (right,τ=0.855/0.865\tau=0.855/0.865, balanced coverage).

Figure 2:Validation loss and PPL over training. All CHIAR variants
converge below the baseline. DCT+Attn (gold) achieves the
lowest perplexity, pulling ahead in later epochs.

Figure 3:Per-layer operator routing fractions. Soft routing: L2≈65%{\approx}65\%DCT /35%35\%RBF. Hard routing collapses
to≈99%{\approx}99\%DCT in L2 and≈98%{\approx}98\%Attention
in L3. DCT+Attn confirms this as the optimal configuration.

Figure 4:Operator utilisation entropyUUover training.
Hard routing collapses toU≈0U\approx 0within the first
1,000 steps and never recovers, identifying the optimal
operator pair.

Figure 5:Efficiency vs. accuracy. DCT+Attn achieves the best perplexity
at 62.5% fewer attention FLOPs and 40.8% lower total compute.
